title: A Little Video Tutorial
excerpt: We're busy working on a bunch of fun projects over here. One of the things we are going to try to do for the blog is more tutorials, both in photos and videos. For those who have taken any of…
body:
We're busy working on a bunch of fun projects over here. One of the things we are going to try to do for the blog is more tutorials, both in photos and videos. For those who have taken any of my online classes, you know how much I love sharing the process. Before you watch the video, you must know that I am not a card-maker. Or a stamper. I did, however, want to show you how I used these products together, and a card was the easiest thing I could come up with. No doubt you creatives out there can dream up something much fancier. Hope you enjoy the little video.

Supplies: Heidi Swapp Color Magic alphas, watercolor set from Michaels, Studio Calico Hero Arts chevron stamp, Hero Arts Shadow Inks, washi tape and camera paper.
